_note: SUS-5 - promotes the last in-code magic numbers of the sustainability engine to data. Corporate baseline; a project override layers on top at <project>/_BIM_COORD/sustainability/green_physics.json (same shape, additive merge). Every value has an in-code default so a missing/partial file degrades to the prior behaviour.

verticalSolar._note: Indicative vertical-facade transposition of horizontal GHI by orientation: factor = base + range*0.5*(1+cos(theta-equatorFacing)). base ~ anti-equator facade, base+range ~ equator-facing.

dhw._note: DHW delivery target (degC). deltaT = target - climate cold-feed (~ annual mean air temp). 45 = low-temp target; raise to 55-60 for hotel/healthcare storage (legionella).

indicativeCarbon._note: Generic per-material-class A1-A3 carbon factors (kgCO2e/kg, ICE v3 / RICS order-of-magnitude) used ONLY when no real factor (EPD / library / WLCA split) resolves and the material is not bio-based - so an unmapped model still yields an INDICATIVE figure, never 0. Keyword match against the material name; longest keyword wins.
